notes.anchor: if anything can be done about peace
notes.note: By "peace" Cicero means a settlement of the civil war between the Caesarian and Pompeian sides; in mid-47 BC the Pompeian remnant was regrouping in Africa, and any reconciliation would have eased his own exposed position at Brundisium.
Sextilis was the old Roman name for the month later renamed August; its Ides fell on the 13th. Cicero awaits the agent Philotimus, who was managing Terentia's accounts.
